title: Erasmus+ 2025 Project Grant Evaluation Results
content:
Announcements

Details

Erasmus+ 2025-1-TR01-KA131-HED-000320839 Project Grant Evaluation Results

Within the scope of the Erasmus+ 2025 project contract period, the grant amounts for students who will study or do an internship abroad have been announced.

When determining the students eligible for grants, the budget allocated to the university was taken into consideration. For study mobility, students with the highest total scores in each program have been selected. The remaining grant amount has been distributed by prioritizing students with the highest total scores among all applicants.

For internship mobility, regardless of program, the top 4 students with the highest total scores have been awarded grants.

•

Click

here to view the relevant list.

Students eligible for Erasmus+ Study Mobility grants will receive funding for a maximum of one semester (up to 6 months).

Students eligible for Erasmus+ Internship Mobility grants will receive funding for 2 months. Applicants who did not submit their internship acceptance letter during the application process must submit it to the Erasmus+ Office by December 26, 2025.

Students listed as yedek may still participate in the program without a grant (zero-grant mobility).

Students who have been selected with a grant but wish to withdraw from their right must send a signed withdrawal petition via email to the Erasmus+ Office by Friday, September 15, 2025, at 17:00. Students who withdraw after this deadline will be considered as having benefited from the mobility, and a -10 point deduction will be applied to their next Erasmus+ application.

•

Click

here for the withdrawal petition template.

Students who wish to object to the evaluation results must send their signed petition to

[email protected]

by Friday, August 29, 2025, at 17:00. Petitions submitted after this date will not be accepted.

An information session will be held for all students listed. During this session, essential details about the program will be shared, including the next steps to be followed and how to complete the necessary documents. The date and time of the meeting will be sent to your university email addresses.

For any questions regarding the announcement, please contact us at

[email protected]

.

Best regards,

Paylaş
